summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 45 features: JWT Authentication, Yahoo Finance Market Data, Twilio SMS (demo mode), Scenario Simulator. All 29 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend pages loading correctly with live data.

issues: Compliance modal appears on every page load and requires checkbox + accept to dismiss. This is expected behavior for financial compliance.
